title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.892 - Cotton Fitzsimmons memorial highway designated for a portion of U.S. 54 in Pike County
text:
227.892.  Cotton Fitzsimmons memorial highway designated for a portion of U.S. 54 in Pike County. — The portion of U.S. 54 from Industrial Park Road continuing east to Business 54 in Pike County shall be designated as "Cotton Fitzsimmons Memorial Highway".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway, with the costs to be paid by private donations.
(L. 2025 S.B. 348)
